text:
Type Code (Third Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the third of up to 10 waiver type codes. There are separate variables for each of 
the 12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_TYPE_CD_03_01 
WVR_TYPE_CD_03_02 
WVR_TYPE_CD_03_03 
WVR_TYPE_CD_03_04 
WVR_TYPE_CD_03_05 
WVR_TYPE_CD_03_06 
 WVR_TYPE_CD_03_07 
WVR_TYPE_CD_03_08 
WVR_TYPE_CD_03_09 
WVR_TYPE_CD_03_10 
WVR_TYPE_CD_03_11
